title: erysimum gladiiferum
intro: Erysimum gladiiferum, also known as gladiolus or sword lily, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Erysimum gladiiferum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and some cultures also use its roots and leaves in various herbal preparations.
